info.description: Drug information gateway — NDC lookup, therapeutic classes, and more.
info.title: drug-gate API

delete.description: Deletes all cache keys matching cache:*, or a subset matching cache:{prefix}* if the prefix query parameter is provided. Does not affect API key or rate limit data.

get.description: Returns all provisioned API keys with metadata.

post.description: Provisions a new publishable API key with app name, allowed origins, and rate limit.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Returns metadata for a specific API key.

delete.description: Marks an API key as inactive. The key remains retrievable but will be rejected by auth middleware.

post.description: Creates a new key with the same metadata and sets a grace period expiration on the old key. Both keys are valid during the grace period.

get.description: Returns service health status and build version.
Returns the generated OpenAPI specification as JSON.
Returns drug names matching the given prefix. Fast typeahead endpoint for building search UIs.
Looks up a drug by generic or brand name and returns its pharmacological classes, brand names, and generic name. Tries generic name first, falls back to brand name.
get.summary: Look up drug class by name

parameters.description: Drug name (generic or brand, e.g. simvastatin, Zocor)
parameters.name: name

get.description: Returns a paginated list of pharmacological drug classes from DailyMed. Defaults to EPC (Established Pharmacologic Class) type. Supports filtering by type: epc, moa, pe, cs, or all.
Returns a paginated list of drugs belonging to a specific pharmacological class, resolved via FDA NDC data. Returns empty data (not 404) for unknown classes.

parameters.description: Pharmacological class name (e.g. HMG-CoA Reductase Inhibitor)
parameters.name: class

get.description: Look up a single drug by name or NDC and return SPL metadata plus parsed interaction sections. NDC is normalized and resolved to drug name internally.

post.description: Submit 2-10 drug identifiers (name or NDC) and get cross-referenced interaction warnings from FDA SPL labels. Each drug's Section 7 is searched for mentions of the other drugs.

400.description: Too few/many drugs or invalid input

get.description: Returns a paginated list of drug names from the DailyMed dataset. Supports case-insensitive substring search and type filtering (generic/brand).

parameters.description: Filter by type: generic, brand, or all
parameters.name: type

get.description: Accepts a product NDC (dash-separated), queries cash-drugs upstream, and returns drug name, generic name, and therapeutic classes. Supports 5-4, 4-4, and 5-3 formats with automatic fallback to padded 5-4.
Resolves a drug name via approximate match, then assembles NDCs, generic equivalents, and related concepts into a single response.
Approximate match search via RxNorm. Returns up to 5 candidates ranked by score. Includes spelling suggestions when no matches are found.
Returns generic product information for the given RxNorm concept identifier.
get.summary: Get generic products for an RxCUI

get.description: Returns NDC codes associated with the given RxNorm concept identifier.
Returns all related concepts grouped by type (ingredients, brand names, dose forms, clinical drugs, branded drugs).
get.summary: Get related concepts for an RxCUI

get.description: Search Structured Product Labels by drug name. Returns paginated SPL metadata from DailyMed.
Retrieve SPL metadata and parsed Drug Interactions (Section 7) from the SPL XML document.
Returns build version, git commit, git branch, and Go runtime version.
